meaning: adv.涓嶈鐪熷湴,鏃犲叴瓒ｅ湴
examples: I can't do anything halfheartedly. I have to do everything 100 percent.
Honestly, I didn't really care, and ended up doing it 2 halfheartedly.
Neither of you do anything halfheartedly and you both have strong, powerful convictions.
Apart from an idle man halfheartedly flipping through a book of local attractions, there was no one in the front of the shop, where miniature carved boats and model fish aged unwanted on the shelves.
